title: wheeeeeeBONK
description: A resource pack which makes sounds for fireworks, wind charges and the mace sound extra spicy (basically they just say WHEEEE and BONK)
body: A very simple resource pack with one goal in mind - to make Mace PvP sound 'epic' (at least that's what I think). Essentially, there are two sounds used - the 'wheeee' and the 'bonk'. The 'wheeee' sound is used in firework rockets, wind charges and wind burst on a mace. And, as you've probably guessed, this adds a 'BONK' sound upon using the mace.
